title: centaurea kolczygini
intro: Centaurea kolczygini, also known as Knautia or Polish Knautia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Caprifoliaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea kolczygini include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by drying the flowers and leaves to create a natural remedy for various health conditions.
